programme.title: Bloomberg BusinessWeek
programme.desc: Carol Massar and Tim Stenovec bring together the latest news from the world of business and finance by harnessing the power of Bloomberg Businessweek reporters and editors.

programme.title: Bloomberg The Close
programme.desc: Alix Steel, Romaine Bostick and Scarlet Fu own the market-moving breaking news around the closing bell in this must-watch daily program to get an edge on equities, earnings and the economy.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S3/E108 - Born Yesterday'. Dad pretends he was born yesterday. Bluey and Bingo have to guide him through his second day on Earth, especially when he discovers food is delicious and steals Lucky's Dad's pie.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S3/E109 - Mini Bluey'. When Dad complains about how dissimilar Bluey and Bingo are, Bluey hatches a plan to make them more alike and happily introduces Mini-Bluey!

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S3/E105 - Obstacle Course'. Chilli sets up an obstacle course in the backyard, but Bluey is disheartened when Bandit turns it into a race and beats her.

programme.desc: 'S1/E2'. Myrtle's aunt Cressy is coming to stay, and she needs Stanley to make her a bed for her. This escalates into Stanley building her a whole set of rooms outside Myrtles actual house.

programme.desc: 'S2/E63 - Hairdressers'. During a game of hairdressers, Bluey discovers that big-headed customer Dad has nits! To help treat them Bingo has to find her voice, while Bluey has to find her ears.

programme.desc: 'S2/E70 - Stumpfest'. Dad and his mates hit the backyard, ready to rip up some tree stumps! But when Bluey and Bingo take over a stump as a nail salon, Dad finds he's got some negotiating to do.

programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - New River'. It hasn't rained in ages, Nelly and Nora find a thirsty flower that needs water.

programme.desc: 'S1/E14 - Takeaway'. Forced to wait five minutes in front of a restaurant for their takeaway, Bluey and Bingo become restless for entertainment, pushing the very limits of Dad's patience.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S1/E15 - Butterflies'. Playing 'Butterflies' in the backyard is great fun, until Bluey runs away with Judo leaving Bingo all alone. Now poor Bingo's heartbroken and Bluey needs to make amends.

programme.title: Stan Can
programme.desc: 'S1/E2'. Myrtle's aunt Cressy is coming to stay, and she needs Stanley to make her a bed for her. This escalates into Stanley building her a whole set of rooms outside Myrtles actual house.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S1/E16 - Yoga Ball'. Bingo loves playing with Dad, but sometimes he forgets Bingo is smaller than her sister. Mum teaches Bingo how to use her big girl bark to keep the fun within her limits.

programme.title: Sarah And Duck
programme.desc: 'S2/E8 - Bag of Bags'. Scarf Lady has misplaced Bag in the Big Shop, so Sarah and Duck help with the search.

programme.title: Colourblocks
programme.desc: 'S1/E4'. The animated adventures of friends who bring colour to the world. Colours learn about themselves through adventure and play with the Colourblocks.

programme.title: My World Kitchen
programme.desc: 'S3/E5 - Aksara's Sri Lankan Fish Curry'. Aksara's curry contains a very special ingredient: tamarind.

programme.title: Mister Maker Comes To Town
programme.desc: 'S2/E4 - Foil Tray Artwork'. Mister Maker helps the Mini Makers build a beautiful country cottage, and creates a marvellous work of art from old foil trays.

programme.title: Pop Paper City
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - Plom's Play'. Plom and his friends want to put on a play for Helping Hand - but what should it be?

programme.title: Swashbuckle
programme.desc: 'S2/E5 - Monster from the Deep'. Cook and Line scare Captain Sinker by reading about a mysterious sea monster, but the tables are turned when they start to believe that the legend is real.

programme.title: Supertato
programme.desc: 'S1/E15 - Super Birthday'. Supertato is delighted when Evil Pea comes to his birthday party but Carrot is suspicious. Soon Evil Pea unleashes the Mini Peas who try to steal Supertato's birthday present.

programme.title: Supertato
programme.desc: 'S1/E16 - Winter Wonderland'. Evil Pea thinks the Veggies won't like it when she covers the Supermarket in ice, but instead they have the best snow day ever, so she creates a giant snowball to ruin their fun.

programme.title: Noddy: Toyland Detective
programme.desc: 'S2/E4 - The Case of the Runaway Train'. Noddy investigates when the train leaves the station without any of the passengers on board.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S2/E69 - Fancy Restaurant'. Bingo and Bluey want mum and dad to smoochy kiss, so they set up a romantic evening for two at their fancy restaurant. Everything goes to plan, until chef Bingo's special arrives.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S2/E76 - Piggyback'. The Heelers take a long riverside walk, but Bingo's legs are tired, and she wants a piggyback. To distract her, mum and dad invent fun games and get her little legs moving again.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S3/E126 - Faceytalk'. Bluey and Bingo love to video chat with Muffin and Socks so they can all draw pictures together. When Muffin won't give Socks a turn, the kids discover what happens when you hog.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S3/E122 - Pizza Girls'. Bluey and Bingo make mud pizzas and deliver them to the grown-ups, but their pedal car's wheel keeps falling off.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S3/E110 - Unicorse'. Bluey can't get to sleep, so Mum reads her one last story. But they are interrupted by Unicorse, the most annoying hand puppet in the world, whom Bluey tries to reform.

programme.title: The Daily Show
programme.desc: 'S29/E132'. An American late-night talk and satirical news television program.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: 'S2/E13 - Retirement Is Murder'. Frasier is excited when he believes that he's cracked Martin's long-unsolved case, the 'Weeping Lotus' murder.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: 'S2/E15 - You Scratch My Book'. Frasier dates pop psychologist Dr. Honey Snow, trying to conceal his low opinion of her work. Niles strings Daphne along with phony stock payoffs to earn hugs and kisses from her.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: 'S2/E18 - The Club'. Sibling rivalry erupts when Frasier and Niles compete for membership in an exclusive men's club.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: 'S2/E14 - Fool Me Once, Shame On You, Fool Me Twice'. Frasier's gullibility makes him a target twice over for an identity thief.

programme.title: Key & Peele
programme.desc: 'S3/E12'. Sketches include the introduction to the newest set of East/West Bowl players, Devon the Landlord searching Jordan's apartment, and Jordan being offended by an overly sexual co-worker.

programme.title: Most Ridiculous
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - Animals'. Local Comedian Schalk Bezuidenhout narrates this series of the funniest, most ridiculous clips.

programme.title: Most Ridiculous
programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - Holidays'. Local Comedian Schalk Bezuidenhout narrates this series of the funniest, most ridiculous clips.

programme.title: Most Ridiculous
programme.desc: 'S1/E5 - Jobs'. Local Comedian Schalk Bezuidenhout narrates this series of the funniest, most ridiculous clips.

programme.title: Most Ridiculous
programme.desc: 'S1/E6 - Kids'. Local Comedian Schalk Bezuidenhout narrates this series of the funniest, most ridiculous clips.

programme.title: Most Ridiculous
programme.desc: 'S1/E7 - Tattoos & Body Bits'. Local Comedian Schalk Bezuidenhout narrates this series of the funniest, most ridiculous clips.

programme.title: Most Ridiculous
programme.desc: 'S1/E8 - Badasses'. Local Comedian Schalk Bezuidenhout narrates this series of the funniest, most ridiculous clips.

programme.title: Most Ridiculous
programme.desc: 'S2/E1 - Dogs'. The weirdest viral clip show around returns and this time it's the turn of man's best friend to get the Most Ridiculous treatment. From prancing pooches to doggy divas. We've got them all.

programme.title: Most Ridiculous
programme.desc: 'S2/E2 - Mums & Dads'. The craziest viral clip show on television returns and this time it's the turn of Mums and Dads to get the Most Ridiculous treatment. From lazy dads to accident-prone mums we've got it covered.

programme.title: See Dad Run
programme.desc: 'S3/E12 - See Dad's Mom With Mom's Dad'. Janie invites David's mother and Amy's father to attend grandparents' day at her school, David demands that his mother and Amy's father stop fighting and try to get along.

programme.title: See Dad Run
programme.desc: 'S3/E13 - See Dad Overreact'. When David begins acting differently around Janie, she becomes worried that she is going to be given away, Joe and Amy are trapped in an elevator with Joe's hero.

programme.title: See Dad Run
programme.desc: 'S3/E14 - See Dad Find His Way Home Part 1'. After a series of incidents goes wrong on his watch, David wonders if he should have stopped acting.

programme.title: See Dad Run
programme.desc: 'S3/E15 - See Dad Find His Way Home Part 2'. David decides he can have it all, and brings the family with him to shoot Marcus' movie in New York. He quickly becomes stretched too thin though, and has to make a choice.

programme.title: See Dad Run
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - See Dad Run Home'. David ends his role as a beloved TV-sitcom dad and transitions into being a stay-at-home parent in the pilot episode of this comedy.

programme.title: See Dad Run
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - See Dad Lose Janie'. David runs into a hiccup with his stay-at-home dad responsibilities when he misplaces Janie.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: 'S2/E9 - Hate Thy Neighbour'. Becker returns from the hospital to find his neighbours are noisier than ever and that Dr Carson has fallen for his abrasive attitude. Margaret and Linda have to deal with a slew of temporary doctors.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: 'S2/E10 - Pain In The Aspirin'. Becker and Liz realise that they have a wacky relationship because they both snoop through each other's stuff.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: 'S2/E11 - Blind Curve'. We find out how Jake became blind and watch him begin to come to terms with the accident, his friend and himself.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: 'S2/E13 - Retirement Is Murder'. Frasier is excited when he believes that he's cracked Martin's long-unsolved case, the 'Weeping Lotus' murder.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: 'S2/E15 - You Scratch My Book'. Frasier dates pop psychologist Dr. Honey Snow, trying to conceal his low opinion of her work. Niles strings Daphne along with phony stock payoffs to earn hugs and kisses from her.

programme.title: Everybody Hates Chris
programme.desc: 'S3/E15 - Everybody Hates The BFD'. Chris is so desperate to raise the funds to go to a Run DMC concert that he jumps at the chance to participate in Mr Omar's Black Funeral Directors' (BFD) scholarship fund.

programme.title: Everybody Hates Chris
programme.desc: 'S3/E7 - Everybody Hates The Bachelor Pad'. On a mission to become one of the 'cool' kids, Chris is caught with cigarettes and is suspended from school.

programme.title: The King Of Queens
programme.desc: 'S1/E5 - Paternal Affairs'. Carrie and Doug join Deacon and Kelly for a weekend trip to celebrate their anniversary.

programme.title: The King Of Queens
programme.desc: 'S2/E8 - Dire Strayts'. Doug and Ray want to get together on a Saturday night to watch sports, but like all good husbands everywhere, they realise that the plan won't work with the wives.

programme.title: The King Of Queens
programme.desc: 'S1/E6 - Head First'. When the hot, new waitress at the local hangout flirts with Doug, he is giddy with excitement. But, Carrie wonders what's up when Doug suddenly starts wearing cologne and nice pants.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: 'S2/E18 - The Club'. Sibling rivalry erupts when Frasier and Niles compete for membership in an exclusive men's club.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: 'S2/E14 - Fool Me Once, Shame On You, Fool Me Twice'. Frasier's gullibility makes him a target twice over for an identity thief.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: 'S2/E16 - Old Yeller'. Becker feels old when he has to renew his driver's licence. To combat this feeling, he buys a motorcycle from one of his patients. In his apartment he injures himself pretending to drive the bike.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: 'S2/E17 - The Roast That Ruined Them'. Becker takes a stab at being social by having a dinner party. Liz slaves away despite the fact that the only people who attend are Reggie and her college boyfriend.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: 'S2/E18 - For Whom The Toll Calls'. Becker takes on the telephone company, Bob takes a self-help course on tape and Reggie is snubbed when a friend from high school gets married.

programme.title: Rules Of Engagement
programme.desc: 'S5/E21 - The Jeff Photo'. Adam and Jeff make some money playing matchmaker for Jennifer and Audrey, but the results of their hook-ups are a disaster.

programme.title: Rules Of Engagement
programme.desc: 'S5/E22 - Double Down'. Jennifer's patience is worn thin when Adam's mother comes for a visit. Meanwhile, being without a TV makes Jeff and Audrey learn to entertain themselves.

programme.title: The Neighborhood
programme.desc: 'S1/E16 - Welcome To The Big Payback'. When Gemma has her car repaired at Calvin's shop, Tina insists she doesn't need to pay for the work, to Calvin's consternation.

programme.title: The Neighborhood
programme.desc: 'S1/E17 - Welcome To The Climb'. When Gemma decides to fire a teacher at her school, she's unprepared for the aftermath. Also, Calvin gets a surprise when he faces off with his newspaper carrier.

programme.title: Everybody Hates Chris
programme.desc: 'S3/E15 - Everybody Hates The BFD'. Chris is so desperate to raise the funds to go to a Run DMC concert that he jumps at the chance to participate in Mr Omar's Black Funeral Directors' (BFD) scholarship fund.

programme.title: Everybody Hates Chris
programme.desc: 'S3/E7 - Everybody Hates The Bachelor Pad'. On a mission to become one of the 'cool' kids, Chris is caught with cigarettes and is suspended from school.

programme.title: Everybody Hates Chris
programme.desc: 'S3/E8 - Everybody Hates Minimum'. With Greg's father out of town, Chris invites Greg to stay at his house for the week. However, Chris' attitude changes after Rochelle and the rest of his family start waiting on Greg.

programme.title: Everybody Hates Chris
programme.desc: 'S3/E9 - Everybody Hates The New Kid'. When another African American kid goes to Corleone, he and Chris hit it off. Unfortunately, the new kid doesn't get along with most of the other kids, including Greg.

programme.title: Most Ridiculous
programme.desc: 'S5/E4 - The Thud!'. Darren Harriott narrates a fresh batch of family-friendly fails. We'll show you the whackiest inventions and find out which is more ridiculous - hoverboards or unicycles.

programme.title: Rules Of Engagement
programme.desc: 'S6/E1 - Dirty Talk'. Jeff is surprised when Audrey informs him that the new friend he made at the gym is gay. Meanwhile, Russell worries the young woman he's dating might be his daughter.

programme.title: Rules Of Engagement
programme.desc: 'S6/E2 - Bros Before Nodes'. Jeff's chauvinist father, who expects Audrey to wait on him hand and foot, extends his visit after spraining his ankle. Meanwhile, Russell has a one-night stand with a woman who won't leave his apartment.

programme.title: The Neighborhood
programme.desc: 'S2/E5 - Welcome To The Soul Food'. The Butlers and Johnsons decide to go on a double-date and everyone gets more than they bargained for at a new restaurant.

programme.title: The Neighborhood
programme.desc: 'S2/E6 - Welcome To The Wagon'. Dave and Tina discover a common bond when they attend a concert together. Also, Gemma seeks the Butlers' help when an unwelcome visitor takes up residence in the Johnson home.

programme.title: The King Of Queens
programme.desc: 'S1/E24 - Art House'. Doug's patience with Arthur's eccentricities is rapidly eroding. In a rage, Doug tells Arthur how he really feels about his insane behaviour and decides to move out.

programme.title: The King Of Queens
programme.desc: 'S9/E13 - China Syndrome Part 2'. Doug and Carrie wonder if they are ready to have a baby, especially since Carrie is in line for a promotion.

programme.title: The King Of Queens
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Pilot'. Doug feels the call of the road and, against Carrie's advice, buys himself the motorcycle.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: 'S2/E18 - For Whom The Toll Calls'. Becker takes on the telephone company, Bob takes a self-help course on tape and Reggie is snubbed when a friend from high school gets married.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: 'S2/E19 - The Bearer Of Bad Tidings'. Becker mistakenly tells the wrong family that their father has died. Margaret and Linda deal with Linda's depressed friend Lynda.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: 'S2/E20 - One Angry Man'. Becker and Linda have jury duty and Jake gets a dog.

programme.title: Rules Of Engagement
programme.desc: 'S2/E14 - Buyer's Remorse'. Adam and Jennifer decide to purchase an apartment in their building, with Jeff and Audrey agreeing to give them a recommendation to the co-op board.

programme.title: Rules Of Engagement
programme.desc: 'S2/E15 - Pimp My Bride'. Jeff finally buys the car he has always wanted, a Camaro. Meanwhile, Adam and Jennifer have decided on a wedding date.

programme.title: The Neighborhood
programme.desc: 'S2/E1 - Welcome To The Re-Rack'. One year after the Johnsons moved next door to the Butlers, Dave is eager to take on a bigger role in Calvin's annual Yardecue and prove how much a part of the community he's become.

programme.title: The Neighborhood
programme.desc: 'S2/E2 - Welcome To The Bully'. When Tina decides it's time to make home improvements, Dave volunteers to re-paint the Butler house, violating Calvin's 'man code'.

programme.title: The King Of Queens
programme.desc: 'S1/E7 - The Rock'. Carrie's best friend has a very annoying husband and when Doug finds out that Carrie has invited the couple to spend the long Thanksgiving weekend with them, he must stop her.

programme.title: The King Of Queens
programme.desc: 'S2/E11 - Sparing Carrie'. When Doug's bowling team sponsor, Bruce Degner, demands winning results, Doug must decide between loyalty to the game and loyalty to his wife.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: 'S3/E2 - Spontaneous Combustion'. Randy Marsh becomes a national hero after he discovers why South Park residents are spontaneously combusting, and Kyle and Stan plot to help Kyle's dad 'resurrect'.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: 'S3/E3 - The Succubus (a.k.a. Chef's Mama)'. The boys try to save Chef from a woman who is stealing him from them, and Cartman gets glasses.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: 'S3/E4 - Jakovasaurs'. A surviving breed of dinosaur is discovered in South Park, but no-one but Cartman can stand them.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: 'S3/E5 - Tweek Vs Craig'. The boys pit two classmates against each other for entertainment. Meanwhile, Kenny takes a home ec class.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: 'S3/E6 - Sexual Harassment Panda'. South Park Elementary is nearly bankrupt when Cartman sues Stan for sexual harassment.

programme.desc: 'S29/E133'. An American late-night talk and satirical news television program.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!
programme.desc: 'S5/E14 - Monster Squad!'. The Titans want to be the scariest trick-or-treaters in town, so Raven casts a spell that turns them into real monsters.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!
programme.desc: 'S5/E17 - Bbrbday'. When he isn't invited to Beast Boy's birthday party, Robin throws his own party, with special guest Bob Uecker.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!
programme.desc: 'S5/E18 - Tall Titan Tales'. Robin tries to tell some tall tales but the other Titans give their own fractured versions instead.

programme.title: Craig Of The Creek
programme.desc: 'S1/E32 - Jessica's Trail'. Jessica wanders into an unfamiliar creek, leaving Craig to find her before his Mom notices!

programme.title: Craig Of The Creek
programme.desc: 'S1/E33 - Dinner At The Creek'. Bernard is left in charge for the evening, so Craig sets out to find his own dinner at the creek.

programme.title: Craig Of The Creek
programme.desc: 'S1/E34 - Bug City'. Craig discovers a bunch of bugs under a rock and decides to build them a city.

programme.title: Craig Of The Creek
programme.desc: 'S1/E35 - The Shortcut'. An unusually hot day at the Creek melts Kit's ice pops.

programme.title: We Bare Bears
programme.desc: 'S2/E2 - Slumber Party'. A storm forces Chloe to spend the night with the Bears.

programme.title: We Bare Bears
programme.desc: 'S2/E3 - Bear Cleanse'. A doctor tells the Bears to improve their health.

programme.title: We Bare Bears
programme.desc: 'S2/E4 - Nom Nom's Entourage'. Nom Nom recruits the Bears to act as his friends.

programme.title: We Bare Bears
programme.desc: 'S2/E5 - Charlie Ball'. The Bears invite Charlie in their basketball team.

programme.title: Summer Camp Island
programme.desc: 'S6/E10 - Chapter 10: The Last Witch'. Hedgehog worries that she may be too little to make big witch decisions.

programme.title: Summer Camp Island
programme.desc: 'S6/E11 - Chapter 11: The Metaphysical Reserve'. Susie steps through a portal into another realm.

programme.title: Summer Camp Island
programme.desc: 'S6/E12 - Chapter 12: Night's Pockets'. Pajamas and Jimjams try to find Time.

programme.title: Summer Camp Island
programme.desc: 'S6/E13 - Chapter 13: Jar Guard'. Mildred's Friend tells a cautionary tale.

programme.title: Adventure Time
programme.desc: 'S3/E1 - Conquest of Cuteness'. King Snuggadoodle and the Huggaboopies invade Finn and Jake's tree house.

programme.title: Adventure Time
programme.desc: 'S3/E1 - Morituri Te Salutamus'. Finn and Jake must survive the tests of the Fight King.

programme.title: Adventure Time
programme.desc: 'S3/E2 - Memory of a Memory'. Finn and Jake have to enter Marceline's mind and retrieve the wake spell.

programme.title: Adventure Time
programme.desc: 'S3/E2 - Hitman'. The Ice King tries to win PB over with his love potion.

programme.title: Regular Show
programme.desc: 'S8/E25 - Kill 'Em with Kindness'. Pops wants to be friends with someone.

programme.title: Regular Show
programme.desc: 'S8/E26 - Meet the Seer'. The guys need to talk to someone smart.

programme.title: Regular Show
programme.desc: 'S1 - Cheer Up Pops'. The guys want to cheer up Pops.

programme.title: Regular Show
programme.desc: 'S8/E28 - A Regular Epic Final Battle Part 1'. An epic final battle begins.

programme.title: Coach Me If You Can
programme.desc: 'S1/E8 - A Christmas Peril'. Daniel struggles to revive Erico's sense of Christmas spirit...

programme.title: Coach Me If You Can
programme.desc: 'S1/E9 - Mister Ball'. Daniel tries to get his friend Maya to come back to the club.

programme.title: Coach Me If You Can
programme.desc: 'S1/E10 - Daniel's Little Secret'. Erico discovers that Daniel plays on the swings in secret.

programme.title: Coach Me If You Can
programme.desc: 'S1/E11 - The Cleats Of Glory'. Daniel lets Erico help him make a short film...

programme.title: LEGO DREAMZzz
programme.desc: 'S2/E9 - Wake That Dreamer'. While Mateo searches for his lost hourglass, his doppelganger, MadTeo, infiltrates Castle Nocturnia and charms everyone as the final trial approaches.

programme.title: The Amazing World Of Gumball
programme.desc: 'S3/E14 - The Question'. After Gumball and Darwin have too much sugary cereal they begin thinking about the mysteries of the universe.

programme.title: The Amazing World Of Gumball
programme.desc: 'S3/E15 - The Oracle'. Gumball Darwin and Anais discover that Banana Joe's mom paints pictures which predict the future.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!
programme.desc: 'S3/E30 - Obinray'. The Titans start speaking Pig Latin to prevent Robin from eavesdropping.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!
programme.desc: 'S3/E31 - Batman Vs. Teen Titans: Dark Injustice'. The Titans try to outprank each other on April Fools' Day.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!
programme.desc: 'S7/E3 - Pig in a Poke'. The Titans are worried when Starfire says she has sent all of her money to a prince online, especially when it could be the clown prince himself.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!
programme.desc: 'S7/E4 - P.P.'. While stopping a museum theft, the Titans encounter the P.P. Goblin, who uses the Titan's pet peeves against them.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!
programme.desc: 'S7/E5 - A Little Help Please'. When they receive a distress call from the TTG animators and artists, the Titans must tone down their actions and avoid big adventures.

programme.title: Totally Spies
programme.desc: 'S7/E10 - The Dah-Who?'. Champion snowboarders go missing and Alex's competitive edge is tested.

programme.title: Supa Strikas
programme.desc: 'S7/E11 - Ball Control'. Supa Strikas prepare for the big Super League final against Invincible United!

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!
programme.desc: 'S5/E13 - The Real Orangins!'. Robin tries to tell the origin story of the Teen Titans.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!
programme.desc: 'S6/E38 - The Cast'. After breaking his leg, Robin is confined to his room and spies through a telescope.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!
programme.desc: 'S6 - Toddler Titans...Yay!'. Control Freak thinks the Titans' humor is too juvenile for their time-slot, so he ages them down to a preschool show.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!
programme.desc: 'S6/E36 - Baby Mouth'. In order to find out about his family history, Robin takes a DNA test and discovers he's from Babylon.

programme.title: Justice League Action
programme.desc: 'S1/E34 - The Cube Root'. When the Calculator hacks into Mr. Terrific's T-Spheres and turns them against him, Firestorm comes to assist - much to Martin Stein's displeasure.

programme.title: Justice League Action
programme.desc: 'S1/E31 - Booster's Gold'. Booster Gold tries to make money off of dinosaurs.

programme.title: Mr Magoo
programme.desc: 'S1/E71 - Magoo's Best Friend'. Magoo mistakes Fizz for an old school friend.

programme.title: Mr Magoo
programme.desc: 'S1/E72 - Welcome to Translovenia'. Magoo mistakes Weasel for a vampire.

programme.title: Mr Magoo
programme.desc: 'S1/E73 - 7 Minutes Flat'. Magoo mistakes Weasel for the President and protects him.

programme.title: Supa Strikas: Rookie Season
programme.desc: 'S1/E12 - A Night To Remember'. On Shakes' biggest night, the pressure is raised when VInce asks questions about his dad.

programme.title: Hero Inside
programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - Jewel of the Nile'. Mike has to put aside differences and take up the identity of Super Awesome Man to save his friend from Dirk and his Hero Book, Mummy Girl!

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!
programme.desc: 'S8/E8 - Winning A Golf Tournament Is The Solution To All Of Life's Money Problems'. After the T-Car is towed due to outstanding parking tickets, Robin has Cyborg enter a golf tournament for the cash prize.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!
programme.desc: 'S8/E11 - The Brain of the Family Part 1'. The Brain's home life is disrupted when his slacker brother Brian comes to visit.

programme.title: Tiny Toons Looniversity
programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - Tooney Ball Lights'. Buster and Sweetie join the Tooney Ball team during Electives Week while Babs and Plucky tackle the basics in Anvils 101, leaving Hamton on a journey to fix his indecisiveness.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!
programme.desc: 'S2/E15 - Smile Bones'. When Cyborg and Beast Boy teach the other Titans to wolf down their food the gang develops a big fat problem.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!
programme.desc: 'S2/E15 - Real Boy Adventures'. When he transforms into Fleshy Guy Cyborg discovers the joy and pain of being human.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!
programme.desc: 'S2/E16 - Yearbook Madness'. Beast Boy and Cyborg decide to make a yearbook for the Titans.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!
programme.desc: 'S2/E16 - Hose Water'. When Cyborg and Starfire find a baby bird it awakens their inner child.

programme.title: LEGO DREAMZzz
programme.desc: 'S1/E1'. When Mateo's comic creation, Z-Blob, follows him from a dream back to Brooklyn, Mateo and his sister realize the Dream World is real, and in danger!

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!
programme.desc: 'S1/E6 - Gorilla'. Beast Boy takes over as Alpha male of the Titans when he is in Gorilla-mode and Robin has to figure out how to get back on top.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!
programme.desc: 'S6/E13 - Record Book'. Starfire wants a world record, so she decides to grow her fingernails.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!
programme.desc: 'S6/E11 - Bat Scouts'. To reach the highest rank in the Bat Scouts, Robin teaches the other Titans important vigilante skills.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!
programme.desc: 'S6/E14 - Magic Man'. In a quest to become a magic man, Beast Boy accidentally destroys Raven's spell book, so they must go find another one.

programme.title: Mr Magoo
programme.desc: 'S1/E76 - Free the Rabbit!'. Everybody loves Magoo! This cheerful guy's always happy to lend a helping hand.

programme.title: Mr Magoo
programme.desc: 'S1/E77 - Ratman'. Magoo mistakes Fizz for billionaire Bruce Payne, aka the superhero, Ratman. When Ratman gets kidnapped by his mortal enemy, Bozo (in reality Weasel), Magoo turns into MegaMagoo!

programme.title: Mr Magoo
programme.desc: 'S1/E78 - Here Kitty'. Magoo mistakes Fizz for Weasel's new kitten.

programme.title: The Amazing World Of Gumball
programme.desc: 'S2/E8 - The Watch'. Gumball and Darwin receive an heirloom from Richard but lose it.

programme.title: The Powerpuff Girls
programme.desc: 'S1/E25 - Fashion Forward'. When the Fashionistas launch a new line of brainwashing clothing, it's up to the Powerpuff Girls to stop the fashion trend before it's too late.

programme.title: The Powerpuff Girls
programme.desc: 'S1/E17 - Once Upon a Townsville'. When a dainty princess on a mission comes to Townsville, the Girls must learn that the superhero way isn't always the right way.

programme.title: Ben 10
programme.desc: 'S4/E28 - Xingo'S World'. Ben, Gwen, and Grandpa Max are on the road again and are supposed to be taking in the beautiful sights, but Ben refuses to put his video games away.

programme.title: Ben 10
programme.desc: 'S4/E29 - Tummy Ache'. Team Tennyson go on a tour of the new Biggie Box Candy Store.

programme.title: Ninjago: Dragons Rising
programme.desc: 'S1/E9 - The Calm Inside'. Lloyd and Wyldfyre lead the escaped dragons in a battle against the Claws while Sora and Arin search for Riyu in hopes of shutting down the Photacs.

programme.desc: 'S1/E12 - A Night To Remember'. On Shakes' biggest night, the pressure is raised when VInce asks questions about his dad.

programme.desc: 'S7/E10 - Communication Blok'. Toni Vern exploits Blok's inability to communicate, by making the Supa Strikas play blind!

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!
programme.desc: 'S5/E43 - Campfire!'. The Titans put on a show but Robin warns that the performance must be boring or else they'll wake up the wolves.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!
programme.desc: 'S7/E25 - Breakfast'. The Titans discover the joys of eating breakfast food for every meal, but will that lead to an old friend becoming too powerful?

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!
programme.desc: 'S7/E29 - Glunkakakakah'. Robin teaches the other Titans the art of concealment through a game of hide and seek.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!

programme.title: Spidey and His Amazing Friends

programme.title: Newsline Biz
programme.desc: Reporting the latest business, finance and economic news with added analysis from studio guests.

programme.title: A Bento Shaped By Layers Of Tradit
programme.desc: There's an ekiben in Nagaoka - shaped by layers of tradition - featuring chicken meatballs with local chilli, 100-year-old abura-age, thrice-pickled eggplants in miso and more with stories to tell.

programme.title: Magical Japanese
programme.desc: The Japanese language is rich in words and expressions influenced by nature, history, and culture - this episode looks at words related to washi. Explore the unique culture behind them.

programme.title: Core Kyoto Mini
programme.desc: Miyama is famous for its roof-thatching tradition - the town of Hanase continues to serve its local speciality, foraged wild food cuisine.

programme.title: NHK Newsline

programme.title: Ukiyo-e Edo-Life
programme.desc: A Summer Delicacy: A group of anglers stand in a fast-moving and undulating river while using 'drifting mosquito hooks' to fish for a summer delicacy that was a favourite of the Edo townspeople.

programme.title: Okinawa
programme.desc: Okinawa Prefecture is a group of subtropical islands in the far south of Japan - we examine its past and present with footage from time-lapse creator Shimizu Daisuke. This time: Shuri Castle.

programme.title: Japan From Above: Up Close
programme.desc: This programme takes you on an aerial journey across 21st-century Japan. Enjoy the bird's-eye view of unique landscapes as well as intimate portraits of the people who inhabit the archipelago.

programme.title: Kabuki Kool

programme.desc: 'S1/E30 - Why Chameleon Changes Colour'. You see there was a time when Chameleon wasn't bright and colourful at all. In fact Chameleon was rather dull and grey... like a rainy day.

programme.title: Tinga Tinga Tales
programme.desc: 'S1/E31 - Why Leopard Has Spots'. You see there was a time when Leopard didn't have spots. All the animals had something special, Lion had his mane, Peacock his beautiful tail, Zebra his stripes...

programme.desc: 'S1/E32 - Why Hyena Has Short Back Legs'. You see there was a time when Hyena didn't have short back legs. He was always chasing around and nipping other animals on the bottom.

programme.title: IGNITION GT
programme.desc: 'S24/E49'. Ignition GT gives you the lowdown on the latest and hottest new cars releases from our local market, but also from the international circuit.

programme.title: Petrolheads

programme.title: Razor Customs
programme.desc: 'S1/E13 of 13'. Razor Customs gives you an inside look into the world of our local tuners

programme.title: Sold In 60 Seconds

programme.title: Buyer's Guide
programme.desc: 'S24/E49'. Buyer's Guide brings you a panel of motoring experts in the motoring industry and is here to guide you through your next vehicle purchase.

programme.title: MythBusters
programme.desc: 'S9/E7 - Hypermiling/Crash Cushions'. Adam and Jamie examine if the movie myth of a convict surviving in a car t-boned by trucks, with two large cops sitting next to them holds up to reality.

programme.title: All Things Motoring
programme.desc: 'S8/E16'. Mike joins Ernest in Cape Town for a day full of fun and games. And a race to the finish line. This is a show full of fun, sun, and friendship.

programme.desc: 'S24/E49'. The Bike Show is a South African motorcycling programme that covers everything on two wheels, from adventure bikes to sport bikes and all points in between.

programme.title: Highway Thru Hell
programme.desc: 'S4/E13 - Fork In The Road'. Jamie returns to the road, taking control of the rotator for the first time in months. After a winter behind his desk, Jamie might be too rusty to avoid a disaster on the highway.

programme.title: IGNITION Goes To SEMA

programme.title: The Fallout

programme.desc: An average Joe stuck in a dead-end job, can't believe his luck when a successful and gorgeous babe falls for him.

programme.title: Robots
programme.desc: AI brings together two unlikely people in this romcom. A womaniser and a gold-digger learn humanity when they are forced to team up and pursue robot doubles of themselves.

programme.title: Paint
programme.desc: Owen Wilson stars as Carl Nargle, a TV painter with his own show who is convinced he has it all. That's until a younger, better artist is hired and threatens to steal everything he loves.

programme.title: Nacho Libre
programme.desc: Jack Black in this crazy comedy. A monk is constantly criticised and berated by those around him. He decides to change things by following his dream of becoming a wrestler.

programme.title: Arctic Justice
programme.desc: Jeremy Renner, Heidi Klum, and James Franco are among the voice talents in this animated adventure film. An Arctic fox working in the mailroom aspires to deliver the mail.

programme.title: Richard The Stork 2
programme.desc: Richard, the daring sparrow who was adopted by a stork family, is back for another adventure. He embarks on a solo journey when he realises he won't be his flock leader.

programme.title: The Elephant King
programme.desc: A heartwarming animation. After being humiliated by others, 'Shadfil' goes through ups and downs in adventures to finally win everyone's heart and become the real elephant king.

programme.title: Noah's Ark
programme.desc: This musical animation follows the adventures of two mice who attempt to board Noah's Ark with the help of an ingenious cockroach and sheer luck.

programme.title: Despicable Me 2
programme.desc: Gru, the world's most lovable villain, and his minions return for another adventure. This time he's recruited to help bring down a bad guy while trying to raise three girls.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania 3...
programme.desc: 'Hotel Transylvania 3: A Monster Vacation'. This fun, adventurous third instalment sees the monster family embark on a cruise vacation, where Dracula falls for the cruise captain.

programme.title: Penguins Of Madagascar
programme.desc: The mischievous penguins from the Madagascar franchise get their own movie. Skipper and his crew join forces with an undercover agency to take down an evil villain.

programme.title: The Angry Birds Movie
programme.desc: A great animation based on the hit video game. An island with happy, flightless birds is visited by mysterious pigs and the only angry bird on the island is suspicious of them.

programme.title: Smurfs: The Lost Village
programme.desc: Songstress Demi Lovato voices a favourite character in this fun-filled animation. A mysterious map leads Smurfette and her friends on an adventure through the Forbidden Forest.

programme.title: Ghostbusters: Frozen Empire
programme.desc: It's all hands on deck in this exciting sequel to 2021's hit reboot. It brings together Ghostbusters, new and old, as they try to save the world from a second ice age.

programme.title: The Estate
programme.desc: An all-star cast drives this crazy comedy about family greed. Two sisters try to win over their wealthy aunt in hopes of inheriting, but their family members also have the same idea.

programme.desc: 'Test Series - West Indies vs Bangladesh 2nd Test Day 5'. LIVE From Sabina Park - Kingston, Jamaica.

programme.title: Freelance
programme.desc: All hell breaks loose in this action comedy starring John Cena and Alison Brie. An ex-special forces operative is hired to protect a journalist as she interviews a dictator.

programme.title: Fear The Night
programme.desc: Maggie Q drives this action thriller. An Iraqi war veteran prepares to strike back after a group of home invaders attack during her sister's bachelorette party.

programme.title: 47 Meters Down: Uncaged
programme.desc: A deepsea thriller. Four teen girls diving in an underwater ruin quickly learn they've entered the territory of the deadliest shark species in the claustrophobic labyrinth.

programme.title: Sworn Justice
programme.desc: A gripping cat-and-mouse thriller. Kidnapped and separated during the holidays, a couple must follow the demands of their faceless tormentor if they want to survive.

programme.title: Alpha
programme.desc: A prehistoric epic about survival. When a hunting trip goes wrong, a young man forms an unlikely bond with a wolf and the two fight to survive the elements.

programme.title: Occupation: Rainfall
programme.desc: It's non-stop action in this sci-fi. Two years after aliens land on Earth, survivors from Sydney, Australia, fight in a desperate war as the number of casualties continue to grow.

programme.title: Gray Matter
programme.desc: An electrifying sci-fi thriller. Aurora's mother has taught her that their superhuman abilities make them unique but also dangerous. One fateful night puts that to the test.

programme.title: Righteous Thieves
programme.desc: A heist thriller with massive stakes. The head of a secret organisation assembles a team of thieves to recover priceless artwork stolen by the Nazis during World War II.

programme.title: Dig
programme.desc: A compelling home invasion thriller. A widowed father and his daughter are taken hostage by a dangerous couple who won't stop until they retrieve what lies beneath their property.

programme.title: The Scorpion King
programme.desc: Dwayne Johnson takes his Scorpion King character from 'The Mummy Returns' into its own adventure in this spin-off film about a desert warrior trying to oust a ruthless tyrant.

programme.title: Cash Out
programme.desc: A tense action-thriller led by John Travolta. A professional thief attempts his biggest heist with his brother. However, things go wrong.

programme.title: Fast & Furious
programme.desc: Vin Diesel and Paul Walker return for an explosive crime movie, driven by nitro and betrayal. The crew tries to take down a drug lord, with devastating consequences.

programme.title: Transformers: Rise Of The Beasts
programme.desc: Return to the world of Autobots vs Decepticons in this prequel. During the '90s, a new faction of Transformers, the Maximals, join the Autobots as allies in the battle for Earth.

programme.title: Retribution
programme.desc: Liam Neeson must save his family in this action thriller. A bank executive receives a bomb threat while driving his children to school that his car will explode if they leave.

programme.title: It Lives Inside
programme.desc: This film centres on a young woman who abandons her friend and culture to fit in. When a demonic spirit takes hold of her ex-friend, she must come to terms with her heritage to defeat it.

programme.title: Abigail
programme.desc: A gripping horror tinged with comedy. When a group of criminals kidnaps the daughter of a powerful underworld figure, they soon realise she is no ordinary little girl.

programme.title: Bridget Jones's Baby
programme.desc: Oscar winner Renée Zellweger reprises her role as unlikely heroine Bridget Jones, who, in this sequel, finds herself pregnant and only fifty percent sure of who the father could be.

programme.title: The Butterfly Effect
programme.desc: Everything has repercussions in this Ashton Kutcher time travel sci-fi. Suffering from a lifetime of blackouts, a man discovers that he can alter his life through his journal.

programme.title: Sully
programme.desc: Based on the incredible true story, Oscar winner Tom Hanks stars as an aircraft pilot who makes a miraculous crash landing after a plane's engines give out.

programme.title: First Love
programme.desc: This poignant teen drama shows that love is not easy. A prospective college student experiences his first love and heartbreak while his parents' marriage hits a snag.

programme.title: Worth
programme.desc: As a lawyer, Michael Keaton faces the near-impossible task of allocating funds to the families of 9/11 fatalities in this powerful true-event-based film.

programme.title: Ghost
programme.desc: Demi Moore and the late Patrick Swayze star in this classic romantic drama, about a man who dies and returns as a ghost to protect his wife from impending danger.

programme.title: Jimmy Neutron: Boy Genius
programme.desc: Science and adventure meet in this kid's animated film. A young boy genius and his friends set out to rescue their parents who were abducted by aliens.

programme.title: Extinct
programme.desc: Adam Devine leads an all-star cast in this animation. Two Flummels (an extinct species of fluffy rabbit-like creatures) find themselves transported from 1835 to modern-day Shanghai.

programme.title: Stuart Little 2
programme.desc: Michael J. Fox returns to voice everyone's favourite talking mouse, who heads off on an adventure in this sequel when he races across the city to save a new friend.

programme.title: 47 Ronin

programme.title: Elysium

programme.title: Vacation House For Free
programme.desc: 'S1/E8 - Cottage By The Sea'. Matt takes on the challenge of finding a low-maintenance vacation home in Montauk, New York to help a couple disconnect from their busy city lives.

programme.title: Christina On The Coast
programme.desc: 'S2/E12 - New Design In The Old Hood'. Christina is tasked with renovating a large, water-damaged home. She gets to remake parts of the home in ways she never got to do in her old house.

programme.title: Christina On The Coast
programme.desc: 'S2/E13 - Industrial Kitchen with Boho Flair'. Christina is asked to update a dark and outdated kitchen. Her skills are put to the test when rain delays the renovation.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programme.desc: 'S12/E10 - Massachusetts Millions'. A winning couple search for their very first home in Salem, Massachusetts. The houses are gorgeous, full of history and maybe even a few ghosts!

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programme.desc: 'S12/E11 - For Lovers And Lottery Winners'. David joins a lucky family on their hunt for a dream home that has separate rooms for the kids and a huge garden in Richmond, Virginia.

programme.title: 100 Day Dream Home
programme.desc: 'S5/E1 - No Stone Unturned'. After 20 years of international deployment, a Black Hawk helicopter pilot and his wife call on Brian and Mika to create their forever Florida home.

programme.title: Home Town: Ben's Workshop
programme.desc: 'S2/E3 - Lisa Leslie'. WNBA superstar Lisa Leslie and Ben Napier create a platform for a team of Laurel champions.

programme.title: Home Town: Ben's Workshop
programme.desc: 'S2/E4 - Daryl 'Chill' Mitchell'. Actor Daryl 'Chill' Mitchell and Ben Napier build an intricate and beautiful incline board to help people on the mend.

programme.title: Good Bones
programme.desc: 'S4/E14 - Keeping It In The Family'. Mina and Karen remodel a condo for Mina's sister and her girls. They transform it into a dream home with personalized touches, including a special mural.

programme.title: Fixer Upper
programme.desc: 'S2/E7 - A College Chaplain Seeks Home'. Chip and Joanna must find and then re-imagine the perfect home for the sports chair of Baylor University and the athletes he calls family.

programme.title: Renovation 911
programme.desc: 'S1/E7 - Garage Fires, Faulty Furnaces'. Lindsey and Kirsten take on a family's charred house after a devastating garage fire. Plus, they bring a fresh design to a student education centre.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.desc: 'S187/E4 - Downsizing In Costa Rica'. A Canadian couple is moving with their teenage daughter for a calmer life in Costa Rica but finding everything they're looking for may be a challenge.

programme.title: Flip To A Million
programme.desc: 'S1/E1'. With just six months and $1,000, two flipping duos try to turn their properties into a million-dollar sale. Can they prove they can make a real estate fortune?

programme.title: Bargain Block
programme.desc: 'S4/E3 - Betting On Detroit'. Keith, Evan and Shea bring the Las Vegas strip to Detroit! They infuse elements of the casinos' flash and fun into a dilapidated home.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programme.desc: 'S8/E6 - A Slice Of New Jersey Paradise'. A former police officer couple search for a perfect home in Bergen County, New Jersey after winning a million dollars on the lottery.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programme.desc: 'S8/E7 - On The Throne'. A man who has won a million dollars on the lottery wants to change his family's life. They need David Bromstad's help to find a home within their $180,000 budget.

programme.title: 100 Day Hotel Challenge
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - May The Best Spouse Win'. Brian and Mika Kleinschmidt have 100 days to renovate two hotels. They each call in a pair of veteran designers to tackle the single and double rooms.
